dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal emphasizes staying in established trends with early confirmation (2-3% move) and strong directional bias (ADX > 25 indicates trending regime). Exit conditions capture trend reversal (lower highs/lows via prev_high/prev_low comparison) and hard stop-loss at -15%. The 60+ bar holding period is enforced via hold_days_max. Macro narrative condition is not technically expressible in indicator form; trader discretion required at entry. Entry uses returns > 2% to represent initial directional move confirmation.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal emphasizes staying in established trends with early confirmation (2-3% move) and strong directional bias (ADX > 25 indicates trending regime). Exit conditions capture trend reversal (lower highs/lows via prev_high/prev_low comparison) and hard stop-loss at -15%. The 60+ bar holding period is enforced via hold_days_max. Macro narrative condition is not technically expressible in indicator form; trader discretion required at entry. Entry uses returns > 2% to represent initial directional move confirmation.

source_rule_text: A trader should maintain positions in markets exhibiting major directional trends and avoid exiting prematurely when early price moves (10% of eventual advance) occur, as trends often extend far beyond initial expectations.
